issues.description: [Your Turn] in text requires duration:'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. This is a duration scope violation.

Filter should use 'BySubtypeAndCost' or similar to match both 'Land of Wano' subtype AND cost >= 2. Current 'ByCost' with maxCost:2 is backwards (allows cost 0-2, not >=2). Should be minCost:2 or cost range.

SearchDeck action doesn't capture the 'reveal up to 1' constraint and 'place rest at bottom in any order' mechanic. DSL may need enhanced syntax for selective reveal + reorder functionality, or this requires a custom action structure.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[DON!! x2] [Your Turn] This Character gains +3000 power.
[On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Land of Wano} type card with a cost of 2 or more and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
